---
title: MirrorGemini
filters:
  - quarto-svelte
quarto-svelte:
  use:
    - ../components/MirrorGemini.svelte
---

This document shows you how to use a basic example Svelte component called `Circles.svelte`.

Create one using an HTML template:

```{ojs}
myMirror = html`<my-mirrorgemini></my-mirrorgemini>`
```
